name: qa-planner
description: Portable QA planning plugin for Claude-compatible agents with Plane hybrid work item/card intake, readable attachment intake, artifact sync guidance back to the source card/work item, wiki/page updates, no-assumption planning rules, required status-move clarification when omitted, and explicit status transition policy. It uses skills/qa-planner/SKILL.md as the canonical instruction source and preserves the Codex plugin wrapper.
